shadows.name: hairline-inset-light
shadows.purpose: Resting control inset on light surfaces.

shadows.name: hairline-inset-dark
shadows.purpose: Resting control inset on dark surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Draw overlay and UI state transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: All animations collapse when prefers-reduced-motion is set.

components.name: Kick Connect Button
components.description: Primary CTA for channel connect and draw actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-kick { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: #53FC18; color: #0B0B0C; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-kick:hover { background: rgba(83, 252, 24, 0.9); } .ds-btn-kick:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-kick:active { background: rgba(83, 252, 24, 0.8); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions in panels and toolbars.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid #2B2F33; border-radius: 10px; background: #1C1C1E; color: #F5F5F5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Channel Input
components.description: Kick channel slug field on landing and settings.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="channel name, e.g. xqc" aria-label="Kick channel name" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 48px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #2B2F33; border-radius: 10px; background: #0F0F10; color: #F5F5F5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9AA0A6; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #737373; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(115,115,115,0.24); }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Landing connect card and settings sections.
components.html:
Connect your Kick channel

Enter the channel slug to start a live chat giveaway
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #2B2F33; border-radius: 16px; background: #171717; color: #F5F5F5; box-shadow: 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-card-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9AA0A6; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 8px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: #F5F5F5; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-sidebar-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Live Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 6px; background: #53FC18; color: #0B0B0C; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

narrative.overview: kickaway.win is a streamer's broadcast control panel first and a marketing page second. The UI reads like pro production software: dark canvas, compact controls, sidebar navigation, dense participant lists. Showtime energy arrives at the climax (draw overlay, confetti, wheel spin) while day-to-day operation stays scannable under live pressure.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first tonal layering, not decorative shadows
Geist Variable for sharp, modern legibility at small sizes
Kick green (#53FC18) as electric signal, not wallpaper
Compact shadcn components (h-8/h-9 controls, rounded-lg/2xl cards)
Playful motion isolated to draw moments; utilitarian elsewhere
Sidebar + inset layout for multi-panel giveaway workflow

rules.name: The Electric Signal Rule
rules.body: Kick green appears on ≤10% of any screen outside draw overlays. If green is everywhere, it stops meaning live.

rules.name: The Muted Ink Rule
rules.body: Metadata text uses muted-foreground with a darkened color-mix, never raw neutral-500 on near-black.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Geist carries display through label. No secondary display face; hierarchy is weight and size, not font pairing.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Stronger shadow appears only on floating layers (popover, toast, sheet).

dos: Do keep the interface dark-first; streamers use this beside OBS in dim environments.
Do reserve #53FC18 for live status, primary CTAs, and draw climax moments.
Do use Geist at 14px for dense lists with label-weight buttons.
Do use tonal surface steps and hairline borders before reaching for shadow.
Do isolate playful motion to draw overlay and confetti; keep settings panels static.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS landing patterns: cream backgrounds, purple gradients, hero metrics, identical icon-card grids.
Don't mimic Twitch-clone purple-heavy streaming tool aesthetics.
Don't use overdesigned UI: glassmorphism, gradient text, excessive decorative motion.
Don't put Kick green on large background fills or every button; it is signal, not theme paint.
Don't add uppercase eyebrow kickers above every section; one landing overline is enough.
Don't use side-stripe colored borders on list items or alerts.
Don't nest cards inside cards for participants/winners panels.
